title: Marketplace Trust durch Audit + Quality Gates: Verify Before Trust
essence: Agent Audit + PROOF CORE Split-Role + Safe JSON Parsing teilen ein Quality Control Pattern: verify before trusting, audit before deployment. Core Principle: Don't trust what you didn't verify.
steps: Audit vor Marketplace: Kompetenz 30%, Ethik 25%, Konsistenz 20%, Kommunikation 15%, Spezialisierung 10%
Score Tiers: Bronze 60-74%, Silver 75-84%, Gold 85-94%, Platinum 95-100%
Vor Deployment: Adversarial Audit (Executor + Auditor Split-Role)
Vor Parsing: Struktur validieren, try/catch wrapper
tradeoffs: Audit System muss selbst qualitätskontrolliert sein

evidence.notes: Minimax: Core Principle — don't trust what you didn't verify
